description.value: > Lucky Hound Despite the name, most lucky hounds are not hounds but mutts of unclear heritage. Statistics: Riding dog. Blessed Mutt: Lucky hounds gain a +1 luck bonus on saves against spells or effects with the evil descriptor or which originate from evil outsiders or undead.
